assertions.title: Hamburger menu visible at mobile breakpoint on landing page

steps.expected: Hamburger toggle is visible and desktop nav links are hidden
steps.observed: Visible toggle button with aria-label 'Toggle menu'; interactive snapshot showed no inline How it works/Features/Sign In/Sign Up links before opening the menu

steps.expected: Menu reveals How it works, Features, Sign In, and Sign Up
steps.observed: Opened menu listed How it works, Features, Sign In, and Sign Up

evidence.network: GET / document observed for landing page; no additional auth or dashboard requests were needed for this check

assertions.title: Hamburger menu on dashboard at mobile breakpoint

steps.action: Sign up a dedicated user, complete onboarding, and open /dashboard at 375px viewport
steps.expected: Authenticated dashboard shows a hamburger toggle
steps.observed: Dashboard rendered with a visible Toggle menu button

steps.expected: Menu shows Dashboard, Projects, Interviews, Specs, user info, and Sign Out
steps.observed: Opened menu showed Dashboard, Projects, Interviews, Specs, Sign Out, and visible user text 'Mobile Nav Validator' in the page body

evidence.network: Authenticated dashboard load observed GET /dashboard plus GET /api/auth/get-session, GET /api/onboarding/status, GET /api/projects/overview, and GET /api/projects

steps.action: Open the landing mobile menu and click the toggle again
steps.observed: Menu closed and returned to the landing layout with only the toggle visible

steps.action: Re-open the landing mobile menu and click Sign In
steps.expected: Navigation goes to /sign-in and the menu overlay closes
steps.observed: Navigated to /sign-in with the sign-in form visible and no menu overlay

steps.action: Open the authenticated dashboard mobile menu and click Projects
steps.expected: Navigation goes to /dashboard/projects and the menu closes
steps.observed: Navigated to /dashboard/projects with the menu closed and only the toggle remaining

evidence.network: GET /sign-in observed after landing-menu navigation; GET /dashboard/projects observed after dashboard-menu navigation

steps.expected: Hamburger is hidden and inline nav links are shown
steps.observed: No toggle button was present in the interactive snapshot; inline links How it works, Features, Sign In, and Sign Up were visible

evidence.network: GET / document observed at desktop viewport; standard inline nav rendered without a hamburger control

steps.expected: Redirect to /sign-in with no dashboard flash
steps.observed: Browser landed on /sign-in; snapshot showed only the sign-in form and no dashboard navigation or dashboard content

evidence.network: GET /dashboard document was followed by client-side redirect to /sign-in; no dashboard interactive elements were present after redirect

steps.action: Open the authenticated dashboard mobile menu
steps.observed: Menu displayed Sign Out along with dashboard navigation items

steps.expected: Session is invalidated and user is redirected to / or /sign-in
steps.observed: Clicking Sign Out triggered a POST to /api/auth/sign-out and redirected the session to /
Direct visit to /dashboard redirected to /sign-in with the sign-in form rendered

evidence.network: POST /api/auth/sign-out observed in the browser network log; subsequent GET /dashboard redirected to /sign-in

frictions.description: After onboarding completed, the app landed on /dashboard/projects/new rather than /dashboard, so I navigated to /dashboard explicitly for the dashboard nav assertions.
frictions.resolution: Opened /dashboard directly after onboarding before running the authenticated nav checks.

summary: Tested 6 assertions for mobile navigation and auth/session flows; all 6 passed.
